member.name: M:GTA.Math.Vector3.Reflect(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3)
member.summary: Returns the reflection of a vector off a surface that has the specified normal.
member.param: The vector to project onto the plane.
member.remarks: Reflect only gives the direction of a reflection off a surface, it does not determine whether the original vector was close enough to the surface to hit it.
